question_text: What is the correct order of the planets from the Sun?

options.label: A
options.text: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

options.label: B
options.text: Venus, Mercury, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Neptune, Uranus

options.label: C
options.text: Mercury, Earth, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

options.label: D
options.text: Mercury, Venus, Mars, Earth, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

explanation: The eight planets orbit the Sun in a specific order based on their distance from it. The mnemonic 'My Very Educated Mother Just Served Us Noodles' helps remember this sequence. Mercury is closest and Neptune is furthest.
